metadata.description: Blog marketing skills for Claude Code: SEO + GEO optimization of blog posts, built on top of the aaron-marketing skill pack.

plugins.name: blog-marketing
plugins.description: Optimize a local blog post (HTML or Markdown) for SEO and GEO (AI-citation readiness): diagnose, rewrite content blocks and run a Gemini-targeted GEO pass via aaron-marketing skills, write the file back safely (backup + integrity checks, fail-closed), and emit a change report. Supports full HTML documents, body fragments, and Markdown with YAML front matter.
